LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS UNION SQUARE INVESTMENTS, LLC, SABEER BHATIA AND THE SABEER BHATIA TRUST'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. WHEN TESTING A PLEADING AGAINST A DEMURRER, THE FACTS ALLEGED IN THE PLEADING ARE DEEMED TO BE TRUE, HOWEVER IMPROBABLE THEY ARE. DEL E. WEBB CORP. V. STRUCTURAL MATERIALS CO. (1981) 123 CAL.APP.3D 593, 604. THE LANGUAGE IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT INDICATES THAT A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP EXISTED BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. THEREFORE, THE CLAIMS ARE PERMISSIBLE. MOREOVER, THE PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED THE ELEMENTS OF EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL TO SURVIVE THE ARGUMENT THAT THE CLAIM IS BARRED UNDER THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS. BECAUSE SINGHA'S AGENCY WITH RESPECT TO USI IS IN CONTENTION AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT RECEIVE A JUDGMENT OR RECOVERY FROM SINGHA, DEFENDANTS' ARGUMENT THAT THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS BARRED DUE TO THE SETTLEMENT FAILS. FINALLY, THE COURT DOES NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DECLARATIONS FILED IN OTHER JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS. BACH V. MCNELIS (1989) 207 CAL.APP.3D 852, 865. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS UNION SQUARE INVESTMENTS, LLC, SABEER BHATIA AND THE SABEER BHATIA TRUST'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. WHEN TESTING A PLEADING AGAINST A DEMURRER, THE FACTS ALLEGED IN THE PLEADING ARE DEEMED TO BE TRUE, HOWEVER IMPROBABLE THEY ARE. DEL E. WEBB CORP. V. STRUCTURAL MATERIALS CO. (1981) 123 CAL.APP.3D 593, 604. THE LANGUAGE IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT INDICATES THAT A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP EXISTED BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. THEREFORE, THE CLAIMS ARE PERMISSIBLE. MOREOVER, THE PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED THE ELEMENTS OF EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL TO SURVIVE THE ARGUMENT THAT THE CLAIM IS BARRED UNDER THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS. BECAUSE SINGHA'S AGENCY WITH RESPECT TO USI IS IN CONTENTION AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT RECEIVE A JUDGMENT OR RECOVERY FROM SINGHA, DEFENDANTS' ARGUMENT THAT THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS BARRED DUE TO THE SETTLEMENT FAILS. FINALLY, THE COURT DOES NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DECLARATIONS FILED IN OTHER JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS. BACH V. MCNELIS (1989) 207 CAL.APP.3D 852, 865. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
